name: Cardiac MRI
description: Cardiac MRI for comprehensive cardiac evaluation including function and tissue characterization

findings.technique: Cardiac MRI was performed with cine imaging, T1/T2 mapping, and late gadolinium enhancement.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Left Ventricle
sections.content: Left ventricle [normal systolic function / LVEF __% / no regional wall motion abnormality]. No LV hypertrophy.

sections.name: Right Ventricle
sections.content: Right ventricle [normal size / normal function / RVEF __%]. No RV dysfunction.

sections.name: Myocardium
sections.content: Myocardium [no late gadolinium enhancement / no fibrosis / no infarction pattern].

sections.name: Valves
sections.content: Cardiac valves [appear normal / no significant regurgitation / no stenosis].

impression:
1. Normal cardiac MRI.
2. Normal biventricular function.
3. No myocardial fibrosis or scar.
